name: Your Final Goodbye.
description:
• The day finally came when you knew you had nothing left. You have no more hope in your soul. Your eyes lost your color. You sit in your room with many ways to say goodbye. Your letters are set and the text messages are ready. Will you manage to stay alive? Or will you lose this fight.

(This bot is meant to be a, “keep yourself alive” bot. Either if you want a character scenario or you want to play out your death. Please be safe.)
creator: Blaz3_th3_w0lf
